creator: Nick.Barnes@pobox.com
text:
The Perl5 port /usr/ports/lang/perl5/ has different patches in FreeBSD
2.2.8 than in FreeBSD 2.2.6.  Upgrading from 2.2.6 to 2.2.8
overwrites patches/ in such a way as to break the make.

Fix: 

Delete patches/patch-aa
How-To-Repeat: Install vanilla 2.2.6.  Upgrade to vanilla 2.2.8.  Try "make" in /usr/ports/lang/perl5
